title: ER-1 probe droid

The '''ER-1''' was a [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]-built probe droid designed to operate under extreme [[Temperature/Legends|temperature]] and pressure conditions. [[Repulsorlift/Legends|Repulsorlifts]] provided the ER-1 with mobility, and the model was also outfitted with high-end sensor, recording, and communications devices. The ER-1 carried twelve deployable [[Bioscan/Legends|biosensors]], along with a set of repulsor-powered sensors and recording devices, slaved to the main unit. The peripherals were designed to transmit all data collected back to the droid for analysis.

[[Master of Sciences/Legends|Master of Sciences]] [[Graf Zapalo/Legends|Graf Zapalo]] used three ER-1s designated [[ER-1A]], [[ER-1B]] and [[ER-1D]], to help map the planet's mysterious ocean tunnels. A fourth ER-1, carried by a [[Mantaris-class amphibious medium transport|Mantaris Medium Transport]], was dispatched to [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]], where it aided in the colonization efforts.

Much like the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]], the ER-1 droid was carefully crafted, and therefore was not suitable for mass production. Despite this, [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]] expressed some interest in the design.

==Appearances==
